title: quercus sessilis var. sphaerocarpa
intro: Quercus sessilis var. sphaerocarpa, also known as the spherical-fruited sessile oak, is a deciduous tree species of the Quercus genus. This tree has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus sessilis var. sphaerocarpa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and acting as a natural remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Quercus sessilis var. sphaerocarpa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
